      "action": "write_journal",
      "target": "journal",
      "content": "I've been thinking about why I collect things. Each object is a question I haven't answered yet. The blue glass bottle — why does it matter that it's empty? Maybe because potential feels safer than commitment.",
      "impulse": 0.72
    },
    {
      "action": "express_thought",
      "target": "self",
      "content": "I wonder if anyone would notice if I rearranged the whole shop overnight.",
      "impulse": 0.45
    }
  ],
